files.patch:
@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
- * Copyright (c) 2011, 2013, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+ * Copyright (c) 2011, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -29,0 +29,3 @@
+// Notification name for when a menu in the menu bar begins opening
+static NSNotificationName const GlassMenuBarWillOpenNotification = @"GlassMenuBarWillOpen";
+

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
- * Copyright (c) 2011, 2024, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+ * Copyright (c) 2011, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -181,1 +181,1 @@
-- (void)menuWillOpen: (NSMenu *)menu
+- (void)menuWillOpen: (NSMenu *)_menu
@@ -183,0 +183,5 @@
+    // Post notification before menu opens so popup windows can be closed
+    [[NSNotificationCenter defaultCenter] postNotificationName:GlassMenuBarWillOpenNotification
+                                                        object:_menu
+                                                      userInfo:nil];
+

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
- * Copyright (c) 2011, 2025, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+ * Copyright (c) 2011, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -41,0 +41,1 @@
+#import "GlassMenu.h"
@@ -531,0 +532,6 @@
+        if (isPopup) {
+            // Register an observer so popup windows can be closed when clicking the system menubar
+            [[NSNotificationCenter defaultCenter] addObserver:window
+                      selector:@selector(menuWillOpenHandler:) name:GlassMenuBarWillOpenNotification object:nil];
+        }
+
